history.content:
<thought>
The goal is visible ahead and to the right. The cell directly in front of me is a safe floor cell, while the lava is farther ahead to the right. Moving forward is the safest progress toward the open area leading to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is a wall, so moving forward is impossible. The open path is to my right along the floor cells, while lava is farther ahead on that side. I should turn right to face the safe floor cell.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible up and to the left, but the cell directly ahead of me is floor while the goal’s column is blocked by lava in the middle. Turning left would face a wall, and turning right would also face a wall corridor boundary. The safest useful move is to go forward into the open cell to improve position before turning toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
